scripts.build: pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/shared build && pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/web build && pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/shared build && pnpm --filter @spreadsheet/server typecheck && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
